overall.description: Nighttime drive through a desert industrial corridor in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), approaching and passing beneath a massive illuminated 'TSUNAMI' billboard gantry. The scene features greenhouse structures flanking the road, sparse Joshua trees, and artificial street lighting cutting through the dark desert atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert industrial access road with greenhouse complexes

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert road toward the distant illuminated billboard structure

entered.detail: large overhead billboard structure with red 'TSUNAMI' logo and white background, illuminated against night sky
long reflective-roofed greenhouse buildings running parallel to the road
matching greenhouse structures on the right side of the road
sparse desert vegetation scattered along the roadside
tall industrial streetlights casting warm yellow light pools on the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert industrial road at night, driving toward a distant illuminated 'TSUNAMI' billboard gantry. Greenhouse structures with reflective roofs line both sides of the road, while sparse Joshua trees and industrial streetlights punctuate the dark landscape. The camera moves steadily forward, maintaining a centered approach on the target structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach corridor with overhead gantry structure

events.description: entering the primary illumination zone of the billboard structure, increased brightness from overhead lights

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward as the billboard structure grows larger in the frame, approaching the gantry supports

entered.detail: massive industrial steel support columns for the overhead billboard structure
yellow industrial road signs mounted on poles along the left side
stacked industrial containers visible near the greenhouse structures

segments.scene_description: The camera closes the distance to the billboard structure, which now dominates the center of the frame. The steel support pillars become visible, and the road is flanked by shipping containers and road signs. The greenhouse structures recede into the background as the camera approaches the gantry, entering the brighter illumination zone cast by the billboard lights.

events.description: passing directly underneath the tsunami billboard gantry, view transitions from approaching to passing through the structure

agents.ego_description: driving directly beneath the massive billboard structure, looking up at the illuminated underside before continuing through

entered.detail: the underside of the billboard platform showing structural beams and lighting fixtures
chain-link fencing and gates visible beyond the gantry structure

segments.scene_description: The camera passes directly beneath the massive 'TSUNAMI' billboard, transitioning from open sky to the semi-covered space under the gantry. The support pillars frame the view temporarily before being left behind. The artificial lighting from the billboard creates a tunnel-like effect as the camera emerges on the other side, continuing down the industrial road toward distant lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive along a dark desert industrial road that culminates in a passage beneath a massive, illuminated billboard. It begins with a centered approach toward a distant TSUNAMI gantry, flanked by reflective greenhouse structures, sparse Joshua trees, and rhythmic streetlights. As the camera closes the distance, the greenhouses recede into the background and the steel support pillars of the gantry dominate the frame, bringing the scene into a zone of intense artificial light. The camera then passes directly beneath the massive structure, momentarily transitioning from the open night sky into a tunnel-like space framed by pillars. Finally, the view emerges from under the gantry and continues down the industrial road toward distant lights in the desert.
